name: Tagum City Cathedral
description: The Tagum City Cathedral is a historic church that showcases beautiful architecture and religious art.
history: Built in the early 1900s, this cathedral has been a center of religious life in Tagum.
highlights: Beautiful stained glass windows, Historic altar, Peaceful gardens

name: Liberation Park
description: Liberation Park commemorates the liberation of Davao del Norte and features monuments and memorials.
history: Established to honor the heroes who fought for freedom in the region.

name: Tagum City Museum
description: The Tagum City Museum preserves and showcases the rich cultural heritage and history of the region.
history: Features artifacts from pre-colonial to modern times.
highlights: Archaeological finds, Traditional costumes, Historical documents
